tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control, despite a slightly low fasting glucose. Lipid profile is within target, with favorable HDL and LDL levels. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend review of glycemic management and monitoring for potential hypoglycemia.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
